features.name: Job tracking
features.defaultDataFlow: Stored locally in SQLite. No external AI or external channel is required.
features.sensitivityNote: Saved jobs and notes can reveal employment status, career goals, and job-search urgency.

features.name: Saved searches
features.defaultDataFlow: Stored locally in SQLite. Searches run through configured local source settings.
features.sensitivityNote: Search terms and locations can reveal career goals and relocation constraints.

features.name: Application Kanban
features.defaultDataFlow: Stored locally in SQLite. Optional external channels are user-configured only.
features.sensitivityNote: Application stages, reminders, and notes are private job-search records.

features.name: Application Assist
features.defaultDataFlow: Profile details and selected resume file copies stay local. Resume selection uses the app file picker and app screens receive only a private saved-file reference plus display name.

externalAi.fallback: Application Assist prepares local profile details without external AI. Resume attachment remains manual.

features.sensitivityNote: Profile details and resumes are sensitive. Do not expose raw local paths to app screens or upload saved resumes automatically.

features.name: First-seen and last-seen job tracking
features.defaultDataFlow: Stored locally from monitored public or official job sources.
features.sensitivityNote: Uses posting metadata rather than private candidate records.

features.name: User-approved job-source feeds
features.defaultDataFlow: Off unless the user configures a job-source feed and approves the exact JobsWithGPT details. Source checks send only reviewed saved job titles, location, remote preference, and result limit to that feed. Latest approved contact history is stored locally as safe status details only.

externalAi.fallback: Leave the job-source feed blank and use local, official, or user-opened source paths.

features.sensitivityNote: Search titles and locations can reveal career goals. The scheduler must skip JobsWithGPT unless the current details match the local approval record. The local contact-history ledger must not store raw titles, raw location, resumes, salary floors, private notes, application history, screening answers, profile details, or full source links.

features.name: Ghost-job heuristic scoring
features.defaultDataFlow: Scored locally from public posting signals, source history, and local recency data.
features.sensitivityNote: Default scoring uses job-posting content and local source metadata.

features.name: Ghost-job explanation with external AI
features.defaultDataFlow: Local explanation is preferred. Optional external AI may receive minimized public posting data only after preview and approval.

externalAi.fallback: Show local heuristic reasons without sending data.

features.sensitivityNote: Do not include resume, salary floor, private notes, or application history.

features.name: Job description summary
features.defaultDataFlow: Local parsing and summary should be available where practical. Optional external AI may receive the minimized posting text after preview and approval.

externalAi.fallback: Show local extracted fields and original posting text.

features.sensitivityNote: Public-data-only summaries must not include unrelated candidate data.

features.name: Resume assistance and application readability
features.defaultDataFlow: Resume parsing, explicit readable-text preview and copy, section review, readable export checks, and truthful edit guidance work locally by default. Job posting text may be compared with a selected resume only after the user chooses that resume.

externalAi.fallback: Show local readable-text preview, application readability checks, and user-editable fit notes.

features.sensitivityNote: Resume text and career goals are sensitive. Do not send resume content, salary floors, private notes, or application history outside the app unless a separate optional external-AI workflow is explicitly selected, previewed, redacted, and approved.

features.name: Resume/job fit explanation
features.defaultDataFlow: Local scoring and readable fit signals should work without a provider. Optional external AI requires explicit sensitive-payload selection, preview, redaction, and approval.

externalAi.fallback: Show local fit score, transparent reasons, and user-editable application readability notes.

features.sensitivityNote: Resumes, salary floors, and career goals are sensitive and must not be sent by default.

features.name: Negotiation prep
features.defaultDataFlow: Local prompts and checklists should work without a provider. Optional external AI requires explicit sensitive-payload selection, preview, redaction, and approval.

externalAi.fallback: Show local compensation questions, salary-floor reminders, and written-range checks.

features.sensitivityNote: Negotiation notes can reveal salary expectations, urgency, and personal constraints.

features.name: Salary floor protection
features.defaultDataFlow: Salary floors stay local by default and are used for local filtering, warnings, and score explanations.

externalAi.fallback: Salary-floor filtering and below-floor warnings work locally.

features.sensitivityNote: Salary floor and role constraints are sensitive user data.

features.name: Salary transparency check
features.defaultDataFlow: Check listed pay range, range width, missing criteria, and public posting signals locally.

externalAi.fallback: Transparency checks work locally from posting text and metadata.

features.sensitivityNote: Default check uses public posting data only.

features.name: Salary transparency explanation with external AI
features.defaultDataFlow: Optional external AI may explain public pay-transparency signals only after payload preview and approval.
features.sensitivityNote: Do not include the user's salary floor unless the feature is reclassified as Sensitive and explicitly approved.

features.name: Safe support report
features.defaultDataFlow: Generated and sanitized locally. User chooses whether to copy, save, or attach the report.
features.sensitivityNote: Support reports may summarize app state and must redact names, emails, secrets, paths, URLs, private notes, and raw application content.

features.name: Research and evaluation
features.defaultDataFlow: Use public job postings and synthetic candidate profiles by default.

externalAi.fallback: Run local or synthetic-data evaluation without external AI.

features.sensitivityNote: Real user resumes, salary floors, private notes, application history, or PII-heavy datasets require explicit informed consent.
